subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou seest how I am imprisoned in this city wherein none dwelleth save its inhabitants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی تری بانی حبست فی هذه المدینه التی لم یسکن فیها احد الا اهلها و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @wisdom [hikmat], @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
